svg.title: Hotel use-case section (Memo visual system)
svg.desc: A premium, stepped right-to-left card layout for hotel operations, aligned with Memo's dark technical background, signal accents, and card styling.

text.tspan: Where Memo drives clarity across hotel operations
When a complaint or service failure escalates, Memo helps leaders
review when the issue was first called out, how it was handed off,
who responded, and where execution broke down.
Memo gives visibility into the radio communication behind room turns,
rush cleans, inspected status, maintenance holds, and arrival
preparation so teams can spot where delays begin.
Track how engineering issues are reported, routed, and escalated across
teams to identify slow responses, repeated handoff failures, and
Memo helps hotel leaders identify recurring issue types, repeated
requests, and persistent coordination gaps that would otherwise stay
From arrivals to special requests to amenity delivery, Memo gives teams
better visibility into the communication behind high-touch guest
Create a clearer record of how disturbances, access issues, medical
